heading: ***HEAT ADVISORIES THROUGH FRIDAY EVENING, AND EXTREME HEAT WARNINGS THROUGH THE CHAMPLAIN AND SOUTHERN VALLEYS, AND IN NH, SOUTH OF THE WHITE MOUNTAINS***Today
text: Hazy, hot, and humid. An isolated morning shower, then isolated, strong late-day showers or thunderstorms. Near-record highs, in the upper 80s and 90s, a few extremes approaching 100 degrees. Winds light from the southwest, becoming west 5 to 15 mph.

heading: Tonight
text: A few localized, strong evening thunderstorms, decreasing overnight. Very warm and humid. Lows in the upper 60s to mid 70s. Winds west to southwest near 10 mph, diminishing to light away from Lake Champlain.

heading: Friday
text: Hazy, hot, and humid. Isolated, strong afternoon or evening thunderstorms. Highs in the upper 80s to mid 90s. Winds west to northwest 10 to 15 mph, a few gusts to 25 mph.
